output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?actressLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q3713414 p:P178 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P178 ?character .
  ?character rdfs:label ?charLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?charLabel)) , 'martha') && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?charLabel)) , 'nielsen'))
  .
  ?character wdt:P161 ?actress .
  ?actress rdfs:label ?actressLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?actressLabel) = 'en')
}
